summary.en: Testing and observability for voice and chat AI agents across the agent lifecycle.
summary.zh: 為語音與聊天 AI 代理提供涵蓋整個代理生命週期的測試與可觀測性服務。

highlight.en: Cekura handles automated QA from pre-production simulation to production call monitoring and CI/CD setup, serving 75+ customers across healthcare and BFSI.
highlight.zh: Cekura 處理從上線前模擬與評估、到正式環境通話監控與 CI/CD 建置的自動化品保,服務醫療、金融保險、物流、招募與零售業逾 75 家客戶。

summary.en: The digital legal back-office and incorporation API for European founders.
summary.zh: 為歐洲創辦人打造的數位法務後勤與公司設立 API。

highlight.en: Via Germany's first fully automated incorporation API, it cuts GmbH formations from 6-8 weeks to as little as 3 days and powers flows for partners like Qonto.
highlight.zh: 其德國平台 Beglaubigt.de 將 GmbH 公司設立從 6 至 8 週縮短至最快 3 天,並透過德國首個全自動設立 API 支援 Qonto、Holvi 與 Sevdesk 等夥伴的設立流程。

summary.en: Laminar analyzes, builds, and governs the enterprise systems that run a business.
summary.zh: Laminar 分析、建置並治理驅動企業營運的系統。

highlight.en: Powered by its Implementation Intelligence approach, Laminar serves clients from SMBs to Fortune 10 enterprises across the system delivery lifecycle.
highlight.zh: Laminar 以其 Implementation Intelligence 方法為核心,服務從中小企業到財星前十大企業的客戶,涵蓋完整的系統交付生命週期。

summary.en: AI compliance analysts that automate AML decisions for banks and fintechs.
summary.zh: 為銀行與金融科技公司自動化反洗錢決策的 AI 合規分析師。

highlight.en: Sphinx deploys AI agents to handle the manual work of compliance analysts, making AML decisions that help eliminate customer onboarding bottlenecks.
highlight.zh: Sphinx 部署 AI 代理接手合規分析師的人工作業,進行反洗錢決策,協助消除客戶開戶的瓶頸。

summary.en: A high-performance file system that connects AI and analytics workloads to data.
summary.zh: 連接 AI 與分析工作負載至資料的高效能檔案系統。

highlight.en: Archil turns S3 buckets into a 30x faster, unlimited local disk so AI, analytics, and serverless apps access massive datasets instantly, with no transfer wait.
highlight.zh: Archil 將 S3 儲存桶轉化為速度提升 30 倍、容量無上限的本地磁碟,讓 AI、分析與無伺服器應用無需等待資料傳輸即可即時存取龐大資料集。

summary.en: Loombotic automates wire harness manufacturing, delivering in as little as 7 days.
summary.zh: Loombotic 自動化線束製造,最快 7 天內交付。

highlight.en: Loombotic applies automation to wire harness production, compressing turnaround to as little as seven days for a traditionally manual, labor-intensive process.
highlight.zh: Loombotic 將自動化導入線束生產,把這項傳統上仰賴人力、勞力密集的製程交期壓縮至最快七天。

summary.en: An AI study platform with adaptive AI tutors for students.
summary.zh: 為學生打造、配備自適應 AI 家教的 AI 學習平台。

highlight.en: RevisionDojo combines pre-loaded question sets, study notes, and mini-lessons guided by an AI tutor that adapts to each student individually.
highlight.zh: RevisionDojo 整合預載題庫、學習筆記與小單元課程,並由能針對每位學生個別調整的 AI 家教引導。

summary.en: Find and connect with your ideal customers using a single prompt.
summary.zh: 用一個提示詞找到並聯繫你的理想客戶。

highlight.en: Origami.chat draws on 100+ data sources to find leads, enrich CSVs, and launch outreach sequences, and is used by sales teams at CBRE and Remote.com.
highlight.zh: Origami.chat 運用逾 100 個資料來源尋找潛在客戶、豐富 CSV 並啟動外聯序列,已被 CBRE、Clipboard Health 與 Remote.com 等銷售團隊採用。

summary.en: AI workers that help healthcare orgs find, call, and schedule more patients.
summary.zh: 協助醫療機構尋找、致電並排程更多病患的 AI 工作者。

highlight.en: Careforce's agents autonomously reach patients via phone, text, email, and mail to book visits, need no integration, and claim an 80% close rate to booking.
highlight.zh: Careforce 的代理透過電話、簡訊、電郵與郵件自主聯繫病患以預約看診,無需系統整合、支援 29 種語言,並宣稱對話轉預約成交率達 80%。

summary.en: Asha Health helps medical practices become AI-native.
summary.zh: Asha Health 協助醫療診所轉型為 AI 原生機構。

highlight.en: Asha Health is building self-learning generative AI tailored for healthcare, aiming to weave AI into the core operations of medical practices.
highlight.zh: Asha Health 正打造專為醫療設計、能自我學習的生成式 AI,目標是將 AI 融入醫療診所的核心營運。

summary.en: Automating consumer debt collection with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 自動化消費者債務催收。

highlight.en: CollectWise lets creditors and agencies double recovery rates while cutting collection costs by 75% through its AI-driven platform.
highlight.zh: CollectWise 透過其 AI 驅動平台,讓債權人與催收機構在將催收成本降低 75% 的同時,把回收率提高一倍。

summary.en: A vertically integrated development platform serving as the source of truth for mobile teams.
summary.zh: 作為行動團隊真相來源的垂直整合開發平台。

highlight.en: Revyl unifies the mobile development workflow into a single vertically integrated platform positioned as the source of truth for mobile teams.
highlight.zh: Revyl 將行動開發流程整合為單一垂直整合平台,定位為行動團隊的真相來源。

summary.en: A localization engineering platform for building stateful, context-aware translation APIs.
summary.zh: 用於建構具狀態、情境感知翻譯 API 的在地化工程平台。

highlight.en: Its translation engines persist domain context via retrieval augmented localization and integrate by API, CLI, or CI/CD, powering 200M+ words for Mistral.
highlight.zh: Lingo.dev 的翻譯引擎透過檢索增強在地化在各請求間保留領域脈絡,並可經由 API、CLI 或 CI/CD 整合,已為 Mistral、Solana 與 Cal.com 等團隊處理逾 2 億字的翻譯。

summary.en: Agent simulation and reinforcement learning environments and datasets for AI researchers.
summary.zh: 為 AI 研究人員打造的代理模擬與強化學習環境及資料集。

highlight.en: Calling itself the NVIDIA of training data, Abundant builds RL environments and datasets, powers 3 of the top 6 global AI labs, and taps 500+ domain experts.
highlight.zh: 自稱為訓練資料界的 NVIDIA,Abundant 建構強化學習環境與資料集,支援全球前六大 AI 實驗室中的三家,並借助逾 500 位領域專家的網絡每月產生數十億個訓練 token。

summary.en: Personal AI robots that anyone can program with code, language, and demonstrations.
summary.zh: 人人都能用程式碼、語言與示範來編程的個人 AI 機器人。

highlight.en: Innate builds general-purpose physical robots as open platforms, akin to the first PCs, so everyone can participate in the robotics revolution.
highlight.zh: Innate 將通用型實體機器人打造為開放平台,類比早期個人電腦,讓每個人都能參與機器人革命。

summary.en: An AI-powered automation system for coordinating, maintaining, and monetizing private jet fleets.
summary.zh: 用於協調、維護並變現私人飛機機隊的 AI 自動化系統。

highlight.en: Gander, now acquired, gives private jet operators a single place to coordinate, maintain, and monetize their fleets through AI-powered aviation automation.
highlight.zh: Gander(現已被收購)透過 AI 航空自動化,讓私人飛機營運商能在單一平台上協調、維護並變現其機隊。

summary.en: A data relay network delivering 24/7 connectivity for satellites in low Earth orbit.
summary.zh: 為低地球軌道衛星提供全天候連線的資料中繼網路。

highlight.en: Apolink's hybrid RF-optical inter-satellite link architecture enables real-time, low-latency data relay for commercial, federal, and defense satellites in LEO.
highlight.zh: Apolink 的混合式射頻-光學衛星間鏈路架構,為低地球軌道的商業、聯邦與國防衛星提供即時、低延遲的資料中繼。

summary.en: AI for post-acute senior care across hospice, home health, and skilled nursing.
summary.zh: 服務安寧療護、居家照護與專業護理的後急性期銀髮照護 AI。

highlight.en: Moonset Health applies AI to post-acute senior care settings including hospice, home health, and skilled nursing.
highlight.zh: Moonset Health 將 AI 應用於安寧療護、居家照護與專業護理等後急性期銀髮照護場景。

summary.en: A deterministic reliability layer for deploying frontier AI in regulated enterprises.
summary.zh: 為受監管企業部署前沿 AI 打造的確定性可靠層。

highlight.en: CTGT productizes mechanistic interpretability to intervene at a model's representation layer, encoding SOPs and SEC/FINRA rules for regulated industries.
highlight.zh: CTGT 將機制可解釋性與表徵工程產品化,直接介入模型的表徵層,將企業標準作業程序與 SEC/FINRA 法規編碼,以提供受監管產業所需的數學確定性。

summary.en: A marketplace that lets electric fleets park and charge at any host's EV chargers.
summary.zh: 讓電動車隊在任何主機方的充電樁停放並充電的媒合平台。

highlight.en: Curo lets idle EV chargers (used under 15%) be leased to fleets, claiming 5x more revenue for owners; it is live in 5 states with 50% MoM growth.
highlight.zh: Curo 讓使用率不到 15% 的閒置充電樁出租給車隊,宣稱可為樁主帶來 5 倍營收並讓車隊立即電動化;目前已在 5 州營運,月增率達 50%,投資方包括 Not Boring 與 Eniac。

summary.en: An IDE for orchestrating an army of coding agents from one dashboard.
summary.zh: 在單一儀表板上調度大量編碼代理的整合開發環境。

highlight.en: Capy lets developers orchestrate many coding agents in parallel from a single dashboard, aiming to ship entire sprints at once.
highlight.zh: Capy 讓開發者從單一儀表板平行調度眾多編碼代理,目標是一次交付整個衝刺週期的工作。

summary.en: AI-powered demand forecasting that helps retailers plan, buy, and allocate products.
summary.zh: 協助零售商規劃、採購與分配商品的 AI 需求預測。

highlight.en: Metreecs uses AI demand forecasting to prevent overstock and out-of-stock situations, helping retailers cut waste, free up capital, and lift sales.
highlight.zh: Metreecs 運用 AI 需求預測防止庫存過剩與缺貨,協助零售商減少浪費、釋放資金並提升銷售。

summary.en: Variant builds creative intelligence.
summary.zh: Variant 打造創意智能。

highlight.en: Variant is focused on creative intelligence as its core product offering.
highlight.zh: Variant 以創意智能作為其核心產品。

summary.en: Voice AI simulations for next-generation employee training.
summary.zh: 用於新世代員工訓練的語音 AI 模擬。

highlight.en: Symphony lets enterprises create unlimited interactive AI voice simulations for training; it's live with 2 of North America's top 3 auto insurers.
highlight.zh: Symphony 讓企業建立無限量、模擬真實情境的互動式 AI 語音演練以供訓練;目前已與北美前三大汽車保險公司中的兩家合作,訓練數千名新進理賠人員。

summary.en: Coaching agents that build personalized training programs for athletes.
summary.zh: 為運動員打造個人化訓練計畫的教練代理。

highlight.en: HYBRD aggregates wearable data and fills gaps with an AI logger to build personalized programs modeled on elite coaches like Alex Viada.
highlight.zh: HYBRD 彙整穿戴裝置資料並以 AI 紀錄器補足缺口,依照如 Alex Viada(混合型運動員一詞的創造者)等頂尖教練建立個人化訓練計畫。

summary.en: Sunset finds and moves money for families after the death of a loved one.
summary.zh: Sunset 協助家庭在親人離世後尋找並轉移資產。

highlight.en: Sunset tracks down bank, retirement, and investment accounts plus property after a death, then closes them and moves the money into a Sunset estate account.
highlight.zh: Sunset 在親人離世後追查銀行、退休與投資帳戶及不動產,接著將其結清並把資金集中至 Sunset 遺產帳戶統一管理。

summary.en: An AI app builder for creating real, App Store-ready iOS apps.
summary.zh: 用於打造可上架 App Store 的真實 iOS 應用的 AI 應用建構器。

highlight.en: Rather than one-shot AI demos, x1 guides builders through a structured plan, visual iPhone screen design, step-by-step features, and App Store launch assets.
highlight.zh: x1 不只是一次性的 AI 範例,而是引導建構者完成結構化規劃、視覺化的 iPhone 畫面設計、逐步功能建置,以及上架所需的商店列表、截圖、變現與分析等素材。

summary.en: Devtools and infrastructure for easy, secure customer cloud deployments.
summary.zh: 讓客戶雲端部署既簡單又安全的開發工具與基礎設施。

highlight.en: Ryvn lets companies deploy any workload on any cloud or on-prem and offer Bring Your Own Cloud (BYOC) in minutes, with observability for sensitive industries.
highlight.zh: Ryvn 讓公司能在任何雲端或地端部署任意工作負載,並在數分鐘內為客戶提供自帶雲端(BYOC),並內建適用於敏感產業的可觀測性。

summary.en: An AI assistant for Gmail that predicts and handles actions on your emails.
summary.zh: 預測並代你處理電郵動作的 Gmail AI 助理。

highlight.en: Friday files spam, sifts newsletters for key tidbits, texts important notifications, and replies to mundane emails, leaving only what needs your personal touch.
highlight.zh: Friday 自動歸檔垃圾郵件、從電子報中篩出重點、以簡訊推送重要通知並回覆例行郵件,只留下真正需要你親自處理的訊息。

summary.en: Software for AI-powered traffic lights that improve safety and traffic flow.
summary.zh: 為提升安全與車流的 AI 紅綠燈打造的軟體。

highlight.en: Its AI traffic lights help cities cut pedestrian deaths, improve traffic, and reduce complaints, built by a team from Waymo, Zoox, Google, and Verily.
highlight.zh: Roundabout Technologies 的 AI 紅綠燈協助城市降低行人死亡、改善交通並減少居民投訴,團隊具備來自 Waymo、Zoox、Google 與 Verily 的安全關鍵系統與 AI 經驗。

summary.en: AI agents for dental operations that boost case acceptance and clinical excellence.
summary.zh: 提升療程接受率與臨床卓越的牙科營運 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Avora deploys agents that listen to dental appointments, spot coachable moments, and chart notes to save provider time and raise case acceptance for DSOs.
highlight.zh: Avora 部署能聆聽牙科看診、找出可改進時刻並撰寫病歷的代理,為醫師節省時間,協助牙科集團將臨床卓越制度化。

summary.en: A platform that enables IRL streamers to do what they love.
summary.zh: 讓實境直播主能專注於熱愛之事的平台。

highlight.en: Streamable focuses on supporting IRL (in real life) streamers, building tools that let them concentrate on their craft.
highlight.zh: Streamable 專注於支援實境(IRL)直播主,打造讓他們能專注於本業的工具。

summary.en: A time-aware GTM search engine that monitors your TAM for custom buying triggers.
summary.zh: 監控你的目標市場、依自訂觸發訊號運作的時間感知 GTM 搜尋引擎。

highlight.en: Unlike commoditized contact databases, OpenFunnel continuously tracks time-based signals and surfaces companies the moment custom triggers reveal pain points.
highlight.zh: 與商品化的聯絡人資料庫不同,OpenFunnel 持續追蹤時間性訊號(例如某公司從 OpenAI 轉用自託管模型),並在自訂觸發訊號顯示出痛點時即時浮現相關公司。

summary.en: Managed AI bookkeeping, compliance, and tax for founders.
summary.zh: 為創辦人提供的 AI 託管記帳、合規與稅務服務。

highlight.en: Afternoon.co integrates with sales and inventory systems to automate bookkeeping for ecommerce brands, easing sales tax and multi-channel complexity.
highlight.zh: Afternoon.co 與銷售及庫存系統整合,為電商品牌與新創自動化大部分記帳作業,減輕銷售稅、多通路與庫存管理的負擔。

summary.en: Unusual helps brands market to and shape how AI agents perceive them.
summary.zh: Unusual 協助品牌向 AI 代理行銷並形塑其對品牌的認知。

highlight.en: Unusual applies black-box interpretability to agents like ChatGPT and Claude to diagnose AI misperception and build interventions for Fortune 100 brands.
highlight.zh: Unusual 對 ChatGPT 與 Claude 等代理運用黑箱可解釋性技術,診斷 AI 誤解並打造針對性的介入措施,合作對象包括財星百大品牌及 Change.org、Astronomer 等成長型企業。

summary.en: A platform that lets any doctor open a digital clinic powered by AI medical reasoning.
summary.zh: 讓任何醫師都能開設由 AI 醫療推理驅動的數位診所的平台。

highlight.en: FutureClinic's AI takes a full medical history via empathic chat or voice, narrows likely diagnoses, and suggests evidence-based treatments for doctor review.
highlight.zh: FutureClinic 的 AI 透過具同理心的對話或語音採集完整病史、縮小可能診斷範圍並提出實證治療建議,再由持照醫師審閱並決定如何處置。

summary.en: A reliability platform for last-mile delivery of high-value goods.
summary.zh: 為高價值商品最後一哩配送打造的可靠性平台。

highlight.en: Getcho builds a high-reliability local delivery network on top of high-volume, unreliable fleets, much like TCP builds reliable networking over unreliable IP.
highlight.zh: Getcho 在高量、不可靠的車隊之上建構高可靠性的本地配送網路,正如 TCP 在不可靠的 IP 層之上建立可靠的網路傳輸。

summary.en: An AI document workspace for life sciences, like Cursor for regulated content.
summary.zh: 為生命科學打造的 AI 文件工作區,猶如受監管內容版的 Cursor。

highlight.en: Raycaster helps life sciences teams draft, edit, and review regulatory submissions faster, positioning as a Cursor-style AI workspace for regulated content.
highlight.zh: Raycaster 協助生命科學團隊更快撰寫、編輯與審閱法規文件,定位為受監管內容的 Cursor 式 AI 工作區。

summary.en: A platform for building AI applications and automations for supply chain operations.
summary.zh: 為供應鏈營運建構 AI 應用與自動化的平台。

highlight.en: VortexifyAI lets teams deploy task-specific AI bots in days that analyze millions of data rows, manage long-horizon processes, and stay governed by guardrails.
highlight.zh: VortexifyAI 讓團隊在數天內部署任務專屬的 AI 機器人,能分析數百萬筆資料、管理長週期流程、以副駕或自主模式運作,並受自然語言護欄規範。

summary.en: Sandra AI builds AI employees and an AI-native operating system for car dealerships.
summary.zh: Sandra AI 為汽車經銷商打造 AI 員工與 AI 原生作業系統。

highlight.en: Sandra AI's agents automate all dealership calls and messages and increasingly run sales and aftersales workflows, extending into a unified dealership OS.
highlight.zh: 由麥肯錫、HEC 與 MIT 校友創立,Sandra AI 的代理自動化經銷商所有客戶來電與訊息,並逐步接管銷售與售後流程,進而延伸為整合帳務、排程、庫存與 CRM 的統一經銷商作業系統。

summary.en: Attimet builds predictive models in fintech.
summary.zh: Attimet 打造金融科技領域的預測模型。

highlight.en: Attimet is a fintech company focused on prediction, building models to forecast outcomes in financial markets.
highlight.zh: Attimet 是一家專注於預測的金融科技公司,打造用於預測金融市場結果的模型。

summary.en: Top-rated insurance that helps startups close enterprise and government contracts.
summary.zh: 協助新創拿下企業與政府合約的頂級評等保險。

highlight.en: RiskCube compares top-rated U.S. carriers to deliver D&O, Tech E&O, Cyber, and General Liability coverage required to pass procurement and satisfy investors.
highlight.zh: RiskCube 比較頂級評等的美國保險公司,提供如董監事責任險、科技錯誤與遺漏險、網路險與一般責任險等通過採購與滿足投資人所需的保障,並針對 AI/SaaS、金融科技、政府科技、太空與 Web3 新創量身打造。

summary.en: AI software that helps private equity firms run due diligence faster and more accurately.
summary.zh: 協助私募股權公司更快、更準確進行盡職調查的 AI 軟體。

highlight.en: Keye instantly generates complex data packs like cohort and retention analyses from raw data rooms, giving investors an 80% understanding of a deal in moments.
highlight.zh: Keye 從原始資料室即時生成複雜的資料包(如世代分析、留存率與客戶滾動分析),讓投資人在片刻間掌握交易八成內容,得以評估十倍數量的案件。

summary.en: Real-time compliance governance for enterprise marketing communications.
summary.zh: 為企業行銷溝通提供即時合規治理。

highlight.en: Luthor reviews, enforces, and logs every piece of marketing content as it's created, checking claims against policies and SEC, FINRA, FTC, and UDAAP rules.
highlight.zh: Luthor 在每則行銷內容產生的當下即審查、執行並記錄,依政策與 SEC、FINRA、FTC、UDAAP 等法規核對宣稱內容,服務資產管理公司、註冊投資顧問、放款機構、銀行與信用合作社。

summary.en: An AI web app builder with a unique architecture, positioned against Lovable and Replit.
summary.zh: 採用獨特架構、對標 Lovable 與 Replit 的 AI 網頁應用建構器。

highlight.en: vly.ai claims a radically different architecture that outperforms rivals on complexity, reliability, and scalability while being 7x cheaper than competitors.
highlight.zh: vly.ai 宣稱採用截然不同的架構,在複雜度、可靠性與可擴展性上勝過對手,同時成本低 7 倍,目標是取代 Lovable、Replit、Base44、Bolt 與 Emergent。

summary.en: A new kind of ERP system for factories where AI agents automate repetitive workflows.
summary.zh: 讓 AI 代理自動化重複流程的新型工廠 ERP 系統。

highlight.en: Tiny targets the four million factories still relying on Excel, using LLMs to unlock siloed unstructured data and eyeing network effects across supply chains.
highlight.zh: Tiny 鎖定仍仰賴 Excel 的四百萬家工廠,運用大型語言模型釋放其孤立的非結構化資料,並著眼於網路效應以實現橫跨供應鏈的及時生產。

summary.en: Spend intelligence that helps procurement teams at complex enterprises find savings.
summary.zh: 協助複雜企業採購團隊找出節省空間的支出智能。

highlight.en: Dexter's AI agents mine supplier invoices and contracts to surface consolidation opportunities, contract leakage, and off-contract spend for procurement teams.
highlight.zh: Dexter 的 AI 代理挖掘供應商發票與合約,找出整合機會、合約漏洞與合約外支出,精準呈現資金流向與可節省之處。

summary.en: Alex is a Cursor-style AI coding sidebar that works directly inside Xcode.
summary.zh: Alex 是直接內建於 Xcode、類 Cursor 的 AI 編碼側邊欄。

highlight.en: Alex is a fast sidebar app for Xcode offering the same Cmd+L, Cmd+K, and Apply Code commands as Cursor, so iOS developers no longer switch tabs.
highlight.zh: Alex 是一款快速的 Xcode 側邊欄應用,提供與 Cursor 相同的 Cmd+L、Cmd+K 與套用程式碼指令,讓 iOS 開發者不必再切換分頁。

summary.en: An AI-native agency building custom software for non-technical teams.
summary.zh: 為非技術團隊打造客製軟體的 AI 原生服務公司。

highlight.en: Kilvin delivers a private, secure workspace of custom applications built around each team's workflows in days rather than months, with no in-house engineers.
highlight.zh: Kilvin 圍繞各團隊的工作流程,於數天而非數月內交付一套私有、安全的客製應用工作區,且客戶端無需任何工程師。

summary.en: Professional-grade, browser-based video editing powered by WebCodecs and WebGPU.
summary.zh: 以 WebCodecs 與 WebGPU 驅動、專業級的瀏覽器影片剪輯。

highlight.en: Diffusion Studio Pro is a browser-based non-linear editor using WebCodecs and WebGPU for smooth pro-level performance, bringing Figma-style UX to video editing.
highlight.zh: Diffusion Studio Pro 是一款瀏覽器非線性剪輯器,運用 WebCodecs 與 WebGPU 達到流暢的專業級效能,將 Figma 與 Framer 的現代化操作體驗帶入影片剪輯。

summary.en: Surge is Stripe for telephony, making carrier registration and messaging APIs easy.
summary.zh: Surge 是電信版的 Stripe,讓電信業者註冊與簡訊 API 變得簡單。

highlight.en: While Twilio and other SMS APIs can take weeks to onboard amid rising regulation, Surge onboards startups same day with easy carrier registration.
highlight.zh: 在監管趨嚴下,Twilio 等簡訊 API 開通可能需時數週,Surge 則能當天讓新創上線,提供簡易的電信業者註冊、更佳支援以及更高階的 API 與無程式碼 UI 元件。

summary.en: AI-powered debugging notebooks that help engineers resolve incidents faster.
summary.zh: 協助工程師更快解決事件的 AI 除錯筆記本。

highlight.en: Relvy automatically finds the root cause in over 70% of alerts, and when it can't, engineers can easily guide or correct the investigation to save time.
highlight.zh: Relvy 在逾 70% 的警報中自動找出根本原因,當無法找出時,工程師也能輕鬆引導或修正調查方向,為整個團隊節省時間。

summary.en: A continual-learning and improvement layer for AI agents in production.
summary.zh: 為正式環境中的 AI 代理打造的持續學習與改進層。

highlight.en: Canvas combines post-training, evals, infrastructure, and observability into a flywheel so production agents compound and continually improve.
highlight.zh: Canvas 將後訓練、評估、基礎設施與可觀測性整合為飛輪,讓正式環境中的代理能複利累積並持續進步。

summary.en: Clarus brings LP clarity across private markets.
summary.zh: Clarus 為私募市場的有限合夥人帶來透明度。

highlight.en: Clarus focuses on giving limited partners clearer visibility across their private markets investments.
highlight.zh: Clarus 專注於讓有限合夥人對其私募市場投資擁有更清晰的可見度。

summary.en: Zeroframe was a company pushing the boundaries of AI.
summary.zh: Zeroframe 是一家致力於拓展 AI 邊界的公司。

highlight.en: Zeroframe, now shut down, positioned itself around pushing the boundaries of AI.
highlight.zh: Zeroframe(現已停止營運)當時的定位是拓展 AI 的邊界。

summary.en: Riveter turns the web into structured data through a single search-and-scrape API.
summary.zh: Riveter 透過單一搜尋與爬取 API 將網路化為結構化資料。

highlight.en: Riveter's AI search agents let customers like Snapchat and OpenAI search, scrape, and structure web data at scale, even reading PDFs and images, in one API.
highlight.zh: Riveter 的 AI 搜尋代理讓 Snapchat 與 OpenAI 等客戶能大規模搜尋、爬取並結構化網路資料,甚至可讀取 PDF 與圖片,並為重複的即時搜尋建立客製資料 API。

summary.en: Compliance guardrails-as-a-service that filter harmful inputs and outputs for AI apps.
summary.zh: 為 AI 應用過濾有害輸入與輸出的合規護欄即服務。

highlight.en: Galini lets enterprises create, test, deploy, and refine guardrails from company policies and regulations, claiming $1-10M savings versus building in-house.
highlight.zh: Galini 讓企業依公司政策與產業法規建立、測試、部署並優化護欄,宣稱相較自行建置可省下 100 萬至 1,000 萬美元,並讓 AI 應用在執行時保持合規。

summary.en: Automated physician scheduling that eliminates coverage gaps for clinics and hospitals.
summary.zh: 為診所與醫院消除排班空缺的自動化醫師排班。

highlight.en: Durate auto-syncs with existing systems and uses smart automation to build optimized, personalized physician schedules in seconds, eliminating coverage gaps.
highlight.zh: Durate 與既有系統自動同步,運用智慧自動化在數秒內為醫師團體、診所與醫院建立最佳化的個人化排班。

summary.en: Dev infrastructure for AI software engineers that reveals the prompts behind generated code.
summary.zh: 為 AI 軟體工程師打造、揭露生成程式碼背後提示詞的開發基礎設施。

highlight.en: Gait, now shut down, was a Cursor and VS Code extension that let developers view the prompt behind a block of code and continue off coworkers' conversations.
highlight.zh: Gait(現已停止營運)是一款 Cursor 與 VS Code 擴充功能,讓開發者能查看生成某段程式碼的提示詞、延續同事的對話,並查看 AI 程式碼生成使用的分析數據。

summary.en: Candle helps friends and couples grow closer through 5-minute daily rituals.
summary.zh: Candle 透過每天 5 分鐘的儀式幫助朋友與情侶更親密。

highlight.en: Candle turns relationship maintenance into low-pressure daily games plus a shared canvas widget for leaving notes and doodles on each other's home screen.
highlight.zh: Candle 將關係維繫化為低壓力的每日遊戲(問答、測驗、語音與照片挑戰),並附帶共享畫布小工具,可在彼此的主畫面留下便條與塗鴉。

summary.en: AI coworkers that help banks and fintechs review 100% of customer interactions in real time.
summary.zh: 協助銀行與金融科技即時審查全部客戶互動的 AI 同事。

highlight.en: Rulebase's agents flag compliance breaches and quality gaps across calls, chats, and emails, cutting escalations up to 30% and QA cycles from hours to minutes.
highlight.zh: Rulebase 的代理在通話、聊天與電郵中標記合規違規、高風險問題與品質缺口,並轉派給合適的同事,將升級案件減少多達 30%,並把品保週期從數小時縮短至數分鐘。

summary.en: A voice and video AI interviewer for screening technical candidates.
summary.zh: 用於篩選技術人才的語音與視訊 AI 面試官。

highlight.en: Lightscreen's AI runs full-length technical interviews with smart interruptions and multi-modal cheating detection, giving rubric-based evaluations in minutes.
highlight.zh: Lightscreen 的 AI 進行完整的技術面試,具備智慧打斷與多模態作弊偵測,並在數分鐘內提供依評分標準的候選人評估,已被高成長新創與招募機構採用。

summary.en: An AI co-pilot for design that helps anyone create and refine high-quality assets.
summary.zh: 協助任何人創作與優化高品質素材的設計 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: Supercontrast, now shut down, was built by a team that previously grew Hive's Gencraft AI art generator from 0 to $1M ARR in six months.
highlight.zh: Supercontrast(現已停止營運)由曾在 Hive 將 Gencraft AI 藝術生成器於半年內從 0 做到 100 萬美元年經常性收入的團隊打造,目標是讓任何人都能產出高品質設計。

summary.en: The first docx API for agents, letting them read and edit Word docs without XML.
summary.zh: 首個為代理打造的 docx API,讓代理無需處理 XML 即可讀寫 Word 文件。

highlight.en: Vespper lets agents read and edit docx files without dealing with XML, saving cost and improving performance, aimed at regulatory and legal agent builders.
highlight.zh: Vespper 讓代理無需處理 XML 即可讀寫 docx 檔案,節省成本並提升效能,專為處理文件的法規、合規與法律代理開發者打造。

summary.en: A cloud desktop OS for humans and agents, with a Linux-backed workspace in the browser.
summary.zh: 為人類與代理打造、瀏覽器內由 Linux 支撐的雲端桌面作業系統。

highlight.en: Endstack's endOS gives you a browser-based desktop backed by cloud Linux with files, apps, terminals, and a 24/7 agent reachable via Slack, email, or SMS.
highlight.zh: Endstack 的 endOS 提供一個由雲端 Linux 支撐的瀏覽器桌面,內含檔案、應用、終端機與一個全天候、可經由 Slack、電郵或簡訊聯繫的代理,並原生支援多人即時協作。

summary.en: Matcha is a faster, smarter way for hospitals to hire clinical talent.
summary.zh: Matcha 是讓醫院更快、更聰明招募臨床人才的方式。

highlight.en: Matcha engages clinical candidates at scale and matches them to organizations by qualifications and cultural fit, at a fraction of the cost of job boards.
highlight.zh: Matcha 大規模接觸臨床人才,依資格與文化契合度將其媒合至機構,協助醫院以遠低於求職網站或獵頭的時間與成本找到積極、合格的人才。

summary.en: Scaling genomic AI and polygenic prediction for IVF embryo selection.
summary.zh: 為試管嬰兒胚胎篩選擴展基因組 AI 與多基因預測。

highlight.en: Reticular scales polygenic prediction to help IVF couples plan families today while building a platform to unlock cures for complex heritable diseases.
highlight.zh: Reticular 擴展多基因預測,協助試管嬰兒夫妻當下規劃家庭,同時打造平台以期長遠解開複雜遺傳疾病的療法,由曾在 NeurIPS 與 Nature 發表論文的 MIT 研究者創立。

summary.en: A fast, reliable AI browser agent that performs web actions autonomously.
summary.zh: 快速、可靠、能自主執行網頁操作的 AI 瀏覽器代理。

highlight.en: Smooth autonomously performs web actions with mouse and keyboard and claims to be the most reliable browser agent yet, while being 5x faster and 7x cheaper.
highlight.zh: Smooth 以滑鼠與鍵盤自主執行網頁操作,宣稱是目前最可靠的瀏覽器代理,同時比市面上其他瀏覽器代理快 5 倍、便宜 7 倍。

summary.en: An AI scheduling assistant for construction projects.
summary.zh: 為營建專案打造的 AI 排程助理。

highlight.en: Karmen builds baseline construction schedules from project documents and updates them as the project evolves, saving time and helping avoid delays.
highlight.zh: Karmen 從專案文件建立基準營建排程,並隨專案進展持續更新,為團隊節省時間並協助避免潛在延誤。

summary.en: A 100% free coding agent CLI funded by ads and built on open-source models.
summary.zh: 由廣告資助、建構於開源模型之上的完全免費編碼代理 CLI。

highlight.en: Freebuff makes consumer agent products completely free using open-source models and ad funding; its first product is a coding agent CLI installable via npm.
highlight.zh: Freebuff 運用最佳開源模型並以廣告資助,讓消費級代理產品完全免費;其首款產品是可透過 npm 安裝的編碼代理 CLI,並正在開發免費的 Lovable 競品。

summary.en: An all-in-one AI creative platform that brings the latest image and video models together.
summary.zh: 整合最新圖像與影片模型的一站式 AI 創作平台。

highlight.en: Stewdio gives creative teams one collaborative place to use the latest image and video models, used by music video directors, ad agencies, and architects alike.
highlight.zh: Stewdio 為創意團隊提供一個協作空間,集中使用最新的圖像與影片生成模型,音樂錄影帶導演、廣告公司與建築師都用它製作從饒舌影片到建築渲染的各類內容。

summary.en: AI agents that automate corporate transactions for large law firms.
summary.zh: 為大型律師事務所自動化企業交易的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Pearson Labs builds AI agents that let large law firms run huge books of business, reducing their cost of delivery by 40-60%.
highlight.zh: Pearson Labs 打造 AI 代理,讓大型律師事務所能以 AI 處理龐大的業務量,將其交付成本降低 40% 至 60%。

summary.en: Desktop robotic process automation driven by AI computer use.
summary.zh: 由 AI 電腦操作驅動的桌面機器人流程自動化。

highlight.en: Given just a text prompt, AutoComputer's AI performs all the clicks and keystrokes to automate tedious desktop tasks like financial data entry.
highlight.zh: 只需一段文字提示,AutoComputer 的 AI 便會執行所有點擊與按鍵,自動化如財務資料輸入等繁瑣的桌面工作。

summary.en: Moonshine extends AI to interact with the real world.
summary.zh: Moonshine 將 AI 延伸到與真實世界互動。

highlight.en: Moonshine focuses on bridging AI with physical reality, enabling models to interact with the real world.
highlight.zh: Moonshine 專注於連接 AI 與實體世界,讓模型能與真實世界互動。

summary.en: An AI security engineer that finds, verifies, and fixes code vulnerabilities.
summary.zh: 尋找、驗證並修復程式碼漏洞的 AI 資安工程師。

highlight.en: Gecko uses AI to understand how an app should work, simulates attacks to find critical vulnerabilities, verifies them by exploiting them, and applies a fix.
highlight.zh: Gecko 運用 AI 理解應用應有的運作方式,模擬相關攻擊找出關鍵漏洞,透過實際利用加以驗證,並套用可行的修復方案以維持程式碼安全。

summary.en: An AI operating system for the pre-construction phase of real estate development.
summary.zh: 為房地產開發前置階段打造的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: PermitPortal accelerates the most critical parts of pre-construction, helping developers find the right sites, understand entitlements, and read sentiment.
highlight.zh: PermitPortal 加速前置施工最關鍵的環節,協助開發商找到合適的基地、了解開發權限並掌握地方對開發案的態度,加快取得建照的進程。

summary.en: An AI copilot for construction estimators specializing in Division 8 takeoffs.
summary.zh: 專攻 Division 8 估算、為營建估價師打造的 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: Fresco automates Division 8 (doors, frames, hardware) takeoffs with 99% accuracy, cutting estimator time 70%, having processed 3,000+ takeoffs for contractors.
highlight.zh: Fresco 以 99% 準確度自動化 Division 8(門、門框與五金)的估算作業,將估價師耗時減少 70%,已處理逾 3,000 件估算,並逐漸成為該工種的紀錄系統。

summary.en: AI-enabled M&A deal origination for investment banks, PE, and corporate development teams.
summary.zh: 為投資銀行、私募股權與企業發展團隊打造的 AI 併購案源開發。

highlight.en: Revi uses agentic workflows to replicate a firm's end-to-end deal origination process, removing the precision-versus-scalability trade-off, and is used by KPMG.
highlight.zh: Revi 以代理式工作流程複製公司端到端的案源開發流程,消除精準度與可擴展性之間的取捨,已被 KPMG 以及 KKR 與 Nordic Capital 支持的平台採用。

summary.en: An AI CAD tool for architects and engineers in the AEC industry.
summary.zh: 為 AEC 產業的建築師與工程師打造的 AI CAD 工具。

highlight.en: ArchiLabs builds AI CAD focused on use cases like production homebuilding, modular housing, MEP, and fire suppression systems for architects and engineers.
highlight.zh: ArchiLabs 打造聚焦於量產住宅、模組化住房、機電配管與消防系統等使用情境的 AI CAD,服務建築師與工程師。

summary.en: Struct automates your on-call runbook by root-causing engineering alerts and bugs.
summary.zh: Struct 透過追溯工程警報與錯誤的根本原因來自動化你的待命操作手冊。

highlight.en: Struct cross-references logs, metrics, traces, and your codebase to root-cause alerts and bugs, auto-investigating issues and handing off context in one click.
highlight.zh: Struct 交叉比對日誌、指標、追蹤與你的程式碼庫,精準找出警報與錯誤的根本原因,讓團隊在數分鐘內整合整套技術堆疊、自動調查每個問題,並一鍵交接脈絡以進行修復。

summary.en: An AI-powered platform for aircraft maintenance, repair, and overhaul.
summary.zh: 用於飛機維護、維修與翻修的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Forerunner AI applies AI to aircraft maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) to get aircraft flying again faster.
highlight.zh: Forerunner AI 將 AI 應用於飛機維護、維修與翻修(MRO),讓飛機更快恢復飛行。

summary.en: Vaya helps travelers discover their next vacation for less.
summary.zh: Vaya 協助旅客以更低價格發掘下一趟假期。

highlight.en: Vaya focuses on helping people discover vacation options at lower cost.
highlight.zh: Vaya 專注於協助人們以更低成本發掘度假選項。

summary.en: An Excel add-in that brings AI functions and document support into spreadsheets.
summary.zh: 將 AI 函式與文件支援帶入試算表的 Excel 增益集。

highlight.en: Melder lets users drop PDFs into cells, write smart formulas like =GEN() and =EXTRACT(), and chat with an in-workbook assistant, all without leaving Excel.
highlight.zh: Melder 讓使用者將 PDF 拖入儲存格、撰寫如 =GEN() 與 =EXTRACT() 的智慧公式,並在工作簿內與助理對話,無需離開 Excel 即可加速盡職調查、合約審閱與市場研究。

summary.en: Prompt and context optimization to maximize coding agent performance.
summary.zh: 用以最大化編碼代理效能的提示詞與情境最佳化。

highlight.en: Synth lets teams pick a coding agent harness, model, and task dataset, then optimizes context and prompts to get the best performance on long-horizon tasks.
highlight.zh: Synth 讓團隊選定編碼代理框架、模型與任務資料集,再最佳化情境與提示詞,以在長週期任務上取得最佳效能。

summary.en: An IDE and cloud platform that helps engineers ship 2-3x faster in complex codebases.
summary.zh: 協助工程師在複雜程式碼庫中加速 2 至 3 倍交付的 IDE 與雲端平台。

highlight.en: HumanLayer is an IDE and cloud platform for hard problems in complex codebases, helping engineers ship 2-3x faster without AI slopping up the code.
highlight.zh: HumanLayer 是一套用於解決複雜程式碼庫難題的 IDE 與協作雲端平台,協助工程師加速 2 至 3 倍交付,同時避免 AI 把程式碼搞得雜亂。

summary.en: Crouton is a living map of your organization's people, teams, roles, and ownership.
summary.zh: Crouton 是呈現組織中人員、團隊、職務與權責的動態地圖。

highlight.en: Crouton replaces the patchwork of org charts, Notion docs, spreadsheets, and Slack used to understand how people, teams, roles, and ownership fit together.
highlight.zh: Crouton 取代創辦人與營運者拼湊使用的組織圖、Notion 文件、試算表與 Slack,讓人理解人員、團隊、職務與權責如何隨公司變化而組合在一起。

summary.en: Darkgrade builds a protocol that lets cameras understand the world via LLMs.
summary.zh: Darkgrade 打造一套協定,讓相機透過大型語言模型理解世界。

highlight.en: Darkgrade is building a protocol for large language models to interface directly with image sensors, letting cameras understand what they see.
highlight.zh: Darkgrade 正打造一套讓大型語言模型直接與影像感測器對接的協定,使相機能理解所見的內容。

summary.en: An AI-native business-in-a-box that empowers physical therapists to go independent.
summary.zh: 讓物理治療師獨立執業的 AI 原生一站式營運方案。

highlight.en: HealthSpark handles credentialing, insurance billing, onboarding, documentation, and scheduling so physical therapists can launch independent practices.
highlight.zh: HealthSpark 處理資格認證、保險請款、病患導入、文件與排程,讓物理治療師能開設並壯大自己的獨立診所,專注於照護病患。

summary.en: ISSEN is an AI real-time voice companion for language learning.
summary.zh: ISSEN 是用於語言學習的 AI 即時語音夥伴。

highlight.en: ISSEN gives learners an on-demand AI voice tutor that adapts lessons and conversations to their interests, learning style, and goals to build real fluency.
highlight.zh: ISSEN 為學習者提供隨需的 AI 語音家教,依其興趣、學習風格與目標調整課程與對話,力求帶來過去僅有真人教師才能提供的連結感與樂趣。

summary.en: Charm is a universal payments app that lets you send money to anyone.
summary.zh: Charm 是讓你能向任何人付款的通用支付應用。

highlight.en: Charm makes sending money as easy as email, letting users pay anyone regardless of which app they use while earning 5% interest on their balance automatically.
highlight.zh: Charm 讓轉帳如同寄電郵般簡單,使用者無論對方用哪個 App 都能付款,同時餘額自動賺取 5% 利息。
